titleZh: 中国公司法中的“股东压迫”救济：关于“挤兑条款”的司法解释比较
titleEn: The Chinese 'Oppression' Remedy: Creative Interpretations of Company Law by Chinese Courts
abstractZh: 比较不同案件中“挤兑/压迫”型股东救济在适用路径、证明要件与程序设计上的分歧，并提出少数股东救济的一致化判定框架。
abstractEn: Compares Chinese oppression-remedy case law patterns and proposes doctrinal clarifications for consistent minority-protection adjudication.
